title: Sticky pork ribs – braai it today

seo.title: Sticky pork ribs - braai it today - Marinda Kook

html:
If you're braaiing today, make these pork ribs. Make plenty, because you're all going to eat too much. Lick your fingers and your lips clean!

 

YOU'LL NEED:

  • 8 pork ribs
  • 125 ml soy sauce
  • 100 ml tomato sauce
  • 2,5 ml cumin
  • 10 ml chilli flakes ( if you like it hot)
  • 90 ml honey
  • 5 ml garlic, finely chopped
  • 5 ml ginger, finely chopped

NOW:

  1. mix the ingredients above together
  2. pour over the meat and let it marinate for an hour
  3. braai over slow coals – the dark colour on the meat is the sugar caramelising and it's delicious
  4. Baste the ribs throughout with the marinade

Now sit back and eat yourself full to bursting. Pour a cold one and keep eating.
